title: Creative Coding
description: Design and develop an interactive desktop application that brings a personal story, experience or theme to life by combining machine learning and animation. Think in terms of experience. Examples of approaches: memories, emotions, identity, growth, etc.

title: Liquid Simulator
description: Liquid simulator using custom shaders. The liquid is interactive and reacts to the mouse movement. The colors of the liquid are based on the colors of the background image.
